glosses.ja: 同行する; 一緒に行く

translations.vi: Tôi có thể đi cùng bạn.
translations.hi: मैं तुम्हारे साथ चल सकता हूँ.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite modal auxiliary (present, 1st sg); expresses ability/possibility and selects a bare infinitive complement.
Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular accusative; direct object (patient) of 'begleiten'.
Lexical verb in bare infinitive; complement of the modal auxiliary 'kann'.

translations.en: He wants to accompany his grandma.
translations.es: Él quiere acompañar a su abuela.
translations.ko: 그는 할머니와 같이 가고 싶어 해.
translations.pt: Ele quer acompanhar a avó dele.
translations.he: הוא רוצה ללוות את סבתא שלו.
translations.vi: Anh ấy muốn đi cùng bà của mình.
translations.nl: Hij wil met zijn oma meegaan.
translations.uk: Він хоче піти зі своєю бабусею.
translations.hi: वह अपनी दादी के साथ जाना चाहता है.
translations.pl: On chce pójść ze swoją babcią.
translations.el: Θέλει να πάει μαζί με τη γιαγιά του.
translations.nb: Han vil bli med bestemoren sin.
translations.sv: Han vill följa med sin mormor.
translations.ro: El vrea să își însoțească bunica.
translations.da: Han vil gerne følge sin bedstemor.
translations.ja: 彼はおばあちゃんと一緒に行きたい。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite modal auxiliary (Konjunktiv II form used modally; present, 3rd sg); expresses desire/politeness and selects a bare infinitive.
Attributive possessive determiner; agrees with feminine singular noun 'Oma' in accusative; marks possession.
Common noun, feminine; accusative singular; direct object of 'begleiten'.
Lexical verb in bare infinitive; complement of the modal auxiliary 'möchte'.

sentences.target: Wir wollen Lisa zum Konzert begleiten.

translations.de: Wir wollen Lisa zum Konzert begleiten.
translations.en: We want to accompany Lisa to the concert.
translations.es: Queremos acompañar a Lisa al concierto.
translations.fr: Nous voulons accompagner Lisa au concert.
translations.ko: 우리는 리사와 콘서트에 같이 가고 싶어.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们想陪丽莎去音乐会。
translations.ru: Мы хотим пойти с Лизой на концерт.
translations.pt: Queremos acompanhar a Lisa ao concerto.
translations.he: אנחנו רוצים ללכת עם ליסה לקונצרט.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi muốn đi cùng Lisa đến buổi hòa nhạc.
translations.ar: نحن نريد الذهاب مع ليزا إلى الحفل.
translations.nl: We willen met Lisa naar het concert.
translations.uk: Ми хочемо піти з Лізою на концерт.
translations.hu: Liszával együtt szeretnénk elmenni a koncertre.
translations.hi: हम लिसा के साथ कॉन्सर्ट में जाना चाहते हैं.
translations.pl: Chcemy pójść z Lisą na koncert.
translations.el: Θέλουμε να πάμε με τη Λίζα στη συναυλία.
translations.nb: Vi vil dra på konsert med Lisa.
translations.id: Kami ingin pergi ke konser bersama Lisa.
translations.sv: Vi vill gå på konsert med Lisa.
translations.ro: Vrem să mergem cu Lisa la concert.
translations.cs: Chceme jít s Lisou na koncert.
translations.da: Vi vil gerne med Lisa til koncert.
translations.ja: 私たちはリサと一緒にコンサートに行きたい。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite modal auxiliary (present, 1st pl); expresses volition/intention and selects a bare infinitive.
Proper name; accusative singular; direct object of 'begleiten'.
Contraction of the preposition 'zu' + definite article 'dem' (dative); introduces a directional dative prepositional phrase (goal).
Common noun, neuter; dative singular as object of 'zu' in the PP 'zum Konzert' (destination).
Lexical verb in bare infinitive; complement of the modal auxiliary 'wollen'.

sentences.target: Sie darf ihren Sohn zur Schule begleiten.
sentences.reading: /ziː daʁf ˈiːʁən zoːn tsuːɐ̯ ˈʃuːlə bəˈglaɪ̯tn̩/

translations.de: Sie darf ihren Sohn zur Schule begleiten.
translations.ipa: /ziː daʁf ˈiːʁən zoːn tsuːɐ̯ ˈʃuːlə bəˈglaɪ̯tn̩/
translations.en: She is allowed to accompany her son to school.
translations.es: Ella puede acompañar a su hijo a la escuela.
translations.fr: Elle peut accompagner son fils à l’école.
translations.it: Può accompagnare suo figlio a scuola.
translations.ko: 그녀는 아들을 학교에 데려다 줄 수 있어.
translations.ru: Ей можно проводить сына в школу.
translations.pt: Ela pode levar o filho à escola.
translations.he: מותר לה ללוות את הבן שלה לבית הספר.
translations.vi: Cô ấy được phép đưa con trai đến trường.
translations.ar: يمكنها أن ترافق ابنها إلى المدرسة.
translations.nl: Ze mag haar zoon naar school brengen.
translations.uk: Вона може відводити сина до школи.
translations.hi: वह अपने बेटे को स्कूल छोड़ सकती है.
translations.el: Επιτρέπεται να συνοδεύει τον γιο της στο σχολείο.
translations.nb: Hun får følge sønnen sin til skolen.
translations.id: Dia boleh mengantar anaknya ke sekolah.
translations.sv: Hon får följa sin son till skolan.
translations.ro: Are voie să își ducă fiul la școală.
translations.cs: Smí doprovodit svého syna do školy.
translations.da: Hun må følge sin søn i skole.
translations.ja: 彼女は息子を学校まで送ってもいい。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular nominative; subject (agreement with 'darf' rules out formal 'Sie').
Finite modal auxiliary (present, 3rd sg); expresses permission/allowance and selects a bare infinitive.
Attributive possessive determiner; accusative masculine singular agreeing with 'Sohn'; marks possession.
Common noun, masculine; accusative singular; direct object of 'begleiten'.
Contraction of the preposition 'zu' + definite article 'der' (dative, feminine); introduces a directional dative prepositional phrase.
Common noun, feminine; dative singular as object of 'zu' in the PP 'zur Schule' (destination).
Lexical verb in bare infinitive; complement of the modal auxiliary 'darf'.
